creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Created attachment 213343
Patch to upgrade to xerces-c-3.2.2

Please see attached patch.  I have tested this with poudriere with current ports tree and FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE.  I have also tested all the reverse dependency builds with poudriere:

cad/freecad
cad/sumo
deskutils/kdepim-runtime
devel/libepp-nicbr
devel/xmltooling
devel/xsd
editors/xmlcopyeditor
games/enigma
games/glest
games/traingame
graphics/cegui
graphics/gdal
graphics/qgis-ltr
graphics/qgis
net/pktanon
science/qbox
security/apache-xml-security-c
security/opensaml
security/shibboleth-sp
sysutils/passwordsafe
textproc/amberfish
textproc/libkolabxml
textproc/xalan-c
textproc/zorba

All passed without any build problems.
